about.hero_title: Built for Pakistani Students, By Pakistani Students
about.hero_desc: We understand the struggle of finding international scholarships — so we built the solution.
about.mission_quote: Every deserving student deserves a chance, regardless of resources.
about.mission_desc1: Smart Scholarship Guidance was created to remove the confusion and frustration students face when searching for scholarships abroad.
about.mission_desc2: We combine structured data, intelligent matching, and a student-first approach to make opportunities accessible.
about.problem1: Scholarship info is scattered across hundreds of websites
about.problem3: No personalized guidance for your specific profile
about.team_role: Full Stack Developer — IIUI BSCS F22
about.value_desc: We design everything with students in mind.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue your scholarship journey.
login.welcome_title: Welcome back to your scholarship dashboard.
login.welcome_desc: Sign in to manage your account, profile, and applications securely.

password.min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.mismatch: New password and confirm password do not match
password.same_as_old: New password must be different from your current password
password.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address

forgotPassword.hero_desc: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address linked to your account.
forgotPassword.sent_desc: If an account exists for that email, you will receive reset instructions shortly.
forgotPassword.success: Reset link sent. Check your email.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send reset link. Please try again.
forgotPassword.check_inbox: We sent reset instructions to {{email}}. Check your inbox and spam folder.

resetPassword.hero_desc: Choose a strong password you have not used before on this account.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password below.
resetPassword.success: Password updated successfully. You can log in now.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.invalid_token: Invalid or missing reset link. Please request a new one.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: June 2025 • International Islamic University Islamabad
privacy.overview: ScholarPath is a student project developed at IIUI. We protect your data.
privacy.data_collected:
Name, email, password (encrypted)
Academic profile data
Usage data
privacy.data_use:
Match scholarships
Improve user experience
We do NOT sell your data
privacy.web_scraping: Only public scholarship data is used.

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.subtitle: Curated international scholarships for Pakistani students.
scholarships.no_matches_preference: No scholarships match your study region or degree preference.

sections.title: Top scholarships this season
sections.cta_desc: Join thousands of students discovering opportunities worldwide.

works.label: HOW IT WORKS
works.title: Three steps to your future
works.subtitle: From profile to acceptance — we guide you the whole way.
works.step1_desc: Share your academic background, interests, and goals in minutes.
works.step2_desc: Our decision-tree engine ranks scholarships by your real eligibility — not guesses.
works.step3_desc: Get tailored guidance, deadlines, and document checklists.
works.cta_text: Ready to find your perfect scholarship?

hero.title: Find Your Perfect
hero.desc: Smart Scholarship Guidance helps Pakistani students discover, qualify, and apply to fully-funded scholarships in the USA and Europe.

footer.desc: Empowering students to reach the world.
footer.copy: © 2026 Smart Scholarship Guidance. All rights reserved.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your academic profile and explore scholarships matched to your eligibility.
dashboard.recommended_desc: Scholarships matched to your current profile.
dashboard.no_results_desc: Complete your academic profile to see eligible scholarships here.
dashboard.profile_error: Add your profile to get scholarship recommendations
dashboard.voice_summary_empty: No eligible scholarships found. Complete your academic profile to see matches.

settingsPage.password_desc: Use a strong password to protect your account.
settingsPage.accessibility_desc: Language and voice guidance for multilingual support (FYP requirement).
settingsPage.preferences_desc: Set study-abroad preferences used for recommendations (USA & Europe scope).
settingsPage.notifications_desc: Alerts for eligibility results and scholarship updates.
settingsPage.danger_desc: Permanently delete your account and all related data.
